service_list.name: Roof Repairs Tiled Roofs
service_list.brief: They offer tiled roof repair services in Brisbane, including help with finding and fixing leaking roofs.

service_list.name: Roof Repairs Metal
service_list.brief: They repair Colorbond roofing iron, zincalume roofing iron and decromastic metal roofing, including damaged sheets, screws, valleys, flashings, gutters, down pipes, skylights and whirly birds.

service_list.name: Roof Repairs Commercial Buildings
service_list.brief: They repair commercial building roof issues including box gutters, air conditioning unit leaks, water pooling, waterproofing, box gutter sumps and rusted sheets.

service_list.name: Roof Replacement Zincalume
service_list.brief: They provide roof replacement and re-roofing in Colorbond or Zincalume.

service_list.name: Roof Replacement Tile to Colorbond or Zincalume
service_list.brief: They offer tile roof replacement to Colorbond or Zincalume.

service_list.name: Roof Replacement Polycarbonate
service_list.brief: They replace polycarbonate roof sheets when sheets have faded, been damaged or need to let light in.

service_list.name: Roof Replacement Insulated Roofing Panels
service_list.brief: They offer roof replacement using insulated roofing panels.

service_list.name: Handyman Services
service_list.brief: They offer handyman services under home improvements.

service_list.name: Termite Damage
service_list.brief: They offer carpentry-related termite damage services.

service_list.name: Timber Pergolas, carports and verandas
service_list.brief: They offer timber pergolas, carports and verandas.

service_list.name: Timber Fascia Replacement and Repairs
service_list.brief: They offer timber fascia replacement and repair services.

service_list.name: Asbestos Removal
service_list.brief: They offer asbestos removal as part of home improvement services.

brief.redesign_brief: Keep Queensland Roofing’s practical service depth, licensed-builder proof, phone-first free quote CTA and strong price-match messaging. Improve the site by making the service hierarchy clearer, replacing duplicated navigation/form content with focused page sections, surfacing proof such as licence number and gallery work earlier, and modernising the visual system around the existing logo. The redesign matters because the current scrape shows useful roofing content and trust signals buried inside dated, repetitive pages; a clearer structure should help Brisbane customers quickly identify the right service, trust the operator and call for a quote.

ready_to_build_concerns: No address found in supplied scrape.
No email found in supplied scrape.
No owner name, team members or testimonials found in supplied scrape.
Primary and accent brand colours were not available from supplied CSS excerpts.
Several important service pages are linked but not included in the 10-page scrape, including roof restoration, handyman services, timber work, colours, employment and some home improvement pages.
Blog link exists, but post dates and activity were not included, so blog_active cannot be verified as true.
Asbestos services appear in both roof replacement and home improvement navigation, so content should clarify service scope and compliance language before build.
